allow: Bash(python -c "import json; d=[x for x in json.load\(open\('weather/climatology.json',encoding='utf-8'\)\)['days'] if x['month']==6 and x['day']==12][0]; print\(json.dumps\(d, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); j=[x for x in d['days'] if x['month']==6 and x['day']==12][0]; print\('served has records:', 'rec_high_max' in j, j.get\('rec_high_max'\), j.get\('rec_high_max_date'\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('current:',d['current']\); print\('daily:',d['daily']\); print\('hourly times[8:12]:',d['hourly']['time'][8:12]\); print\('hourly precip:',d['hourly']['precipitation']\)")
